title: leichtlinia protuberans
intro: Leichtlinia protuberans, also known as the 'hairy milk bush', is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Leichtlinia protuberans include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, and its anti-inflammatory properties also make it useful for soothing skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy by infusing its leaves in hot water or making a decoction with the roots, which is often used to treat various health conditions.
